hero.eyebrow: web developer · since 2013 · open for projects
hero.sub: I build web applications people enjoy using — from planning to production. Platforms that bring people together: to date, bid, sing, celebrate and work.

about.title: Hi, I'm David.
about.text: Full-stack developer since 2013 — from tiny one-pagers to enterprise solutions. Today I'm a senior engineer at Pflegehelden working on CRM systems, and as a freelancer I build complete platforms from scratch. My workflow is AI- and agent-optimized: agents handle the routine, architecture and quality stay with me.
about.alt: Portrait of David Gröger at his desk
about.inspectHint: Photo — hover reveals an element inspection

stack.title: The Stack
stack.lede: No percentage bars — everything listed here is what I use in real projects.

log.title: The Career
log.lede: Ten years in one graph: jobs are commits, achievements are tags.
log.graphAlt: Career as a git graph: from modotex 2013 via HTW Berlin and XAIN to Pflegehelden (HEAD, senior)
log.archive: Kochhaus (OXID, working student) · NewStore (test infrastructure) · Nosfair (CRM/ERP) · b.i.b. (IT specialist) — details in the CV.

ph.what: CRM development, Hubspot integration, legacy refactoring (jQuery → Livewire, Laravel 5 → 8), a matching module connecting caregivers and patients.

free.what: Complex web applications, e-commerce, SEO and performance: +200% revenue through marketing automation, CRM statistics 5× faster.

xain.what: Led a team of four developers, client projects from concept to production, cloud migration that ended recurring server outages.

contact.title: Let's build.
contact.lede: Working on a web project and need support? Drop me a line — or talk to the terminal.
contact.note: Based in Bad Fallingbostel, working remotely across DE/AT/CH.

agents.title: The AI Crew
agents.lede: I don't just work with AI — I work with a crew. Agents refactor, test and document in the background while I own architecture, reviews and quality. That's how speed happens without care falling off the table.
agents.pixelAlt: Pixel, the guide bot, pointing at the running pipeline
agents.forgeAlt: Forge, the worker bot, tightening the panel
agents.closing: In practice: legacy migrations (jQuery → Livewire, Laravel 5 → 8), test coverage and docs run agent-assisted — and every line gets reviewed by me. The bots on this site are the same idea, just visible.

work.title: Platforms that bring people together
work.lede: To date, bid, sing, taste wine and work: six platforms I built completely on my own as a freelancer — from the first line to production. Plus projects I took over and extended as a freelancer. Everything is live, everything can be visited.
work.archive: Coinoto · XAIN AG (company website + team lead) · Bitmotion (TYPO3 client projects)

schnappern.name: schnappern.com
schnappern.desc: Live auction platform: daily real-time auctions, automated bidding bot, payments and insured shipping.

socialmatch.name: socialmatch.de
socialmatch.desc: Game-based meetup events in bars: 15+ cities plus Vienna, three age groups, ticketing — built and maintained by me for over 5 years.

speeddating.name: speeddating-xxl.de
speeddating.desc: Speed dating events across DE/AT: up to 20 dates per evening, ticketing and automated matching with contact exchange.

teamevent.name: mein-teamevent.de
teamevent.desc: Team event marketplace for DE/AT: filters by budget, location and group size, 20+ formats, inquiry funnel.

singalong.name: singalong.de
singalong.desc: Sing-along events in 15+ cities plus Vienna: ticketing, vouchers and themed formats from rock to Christmas.

weinhopping.name: weinhopping.com
weinhopping.desc: Wine-tasting hopping across three locations per evening: ticket tiers, vouchers — from the Socialmatch family.

muziqme.name: muziqme · self-booking
muziqme.desc: Self-booking platform for live music: artist registration, direct booking for events, ticketing.

buggyfit.name: buggyfit.de
buggyfit.desc: Fitness platform for moms: course booking, online shop, health-insurance billing, trainer education.

refs.title: Voices from projects
refs.lede: Four reviews from real collaboration — all approved.

patrick.name: Patrick Kuhlmann
patrick.text: David has been successfully taking care of the frontend and backend of my websites for over five years. He brings a lot of experience, and it shows in the high quality! What stands out most is his reliability and availability. Even on weekends he steps in on short notice when something important needs to be done.

ekkehard.name: Ekkehard Gümbel
ekkehard.text: David supported us as a TYPO3 agency in developing and maintaining our client projects. He got up to speed with our tech stack very quickly and was a great addition to our development team. His deep expertise was reflected in the quality of his work.

frederik.name: Frederik Frey
frederik.text: As an IT company, our biggest challenge is finding reliable developers who meet our quality standards. David delivers his tasks within deadlines and takes feedback to heart. When difficulties arise, he reaches out proactively and independently proposes constructive solutions.

felix.name: Felix Hahmann
felix.text: David actively supported XAIN's early phase with his web development expertise. Beyond our own web presence, he held a technical lead role in client projects, which he carried out with great dedication and professionalism paired with excellent expertise.
